post_fix_for: VIB-5618 N-leg reconciliation VOLATILE-path proof + re-capture (Seam A/B on the fixed valuer). RE-CAPTURED from a fresh managed-Anvil tricrypto2 round-trip on main@48fd8b9b7 (PR #3172): the portfolio_snapshots now PRICE the N-coin universe (USDT/WBTC/WETH, WBTC ~$61.5k) into wallet equity — Seam A holds on the volatile non-$1 path (pre-fix the snapshots carried only USDC/ETH; WBTC fell out of equity). principal_recovered_usd == cost_basis_usd exactly ($307.29997558) — Seam B N-complete on non-$1 coins. Cells UNCHANGED vs the prior capture (G6 still FAIL). The snapshot-coverage standing invariant is now a HARD gate (un-xfail'd). G6 residual RE-CLASSIFIED: Σ_lp_fees_null (BUNDLED fees, shared w/ stablecoin lp_curve) + Σ_inventory_reval_usd_null — the latter is NO LONGER held-WBTC (WBTC is now marked; per_token shows WBTC + ETH Δmark measured); it is WETH, a coin RETURNED by the proportional 3-coin close, absent from the INITIAL snapshot → no initial mark → the all-or-nothing ambient term degrades to unmeasured_price (Empty≠Zero, correct). A distinct close-returned-coin endpoint-mark surface, NOT the Seam-A gap this proof closed. Real-fork proof: tests/reports/vib-5618-tricrypto-volatile-nleg-realfork.md.

VIB-5553 crypto-numeraire per-event USD — pool-coin (USDT/WBTC/WETH) price capture into price_inputs_json (both lanes) → LP_OPEN/LP_CLOSE book cost_basis_usd + realized_pnl_usd; G3 FAIL->PASS, Σ_lp_usd_null closed. Fee USD still unavailable-by-design (BUNDLED) → CLOSE ESTIMATED + curve_fee_usd_unavailable reason (CURVE3 PASS).

_provenance.note: Real-fork LP_OPEN (iteration lane) -> teardown LP_CLOSE round-trip on managed Anvil ethereum. Pool: tricrypto2 0xD51a44d3FaE010294C616388b506AcdA1bfAAE46 (USDT/WBTC/WETH) — non-$1 numeraire. Single-sided 0.005 WBTC deposit -> CURVE4 XFAIL (IL undefined). min_lp derived fail-closed from on-chain calc_token_amount (VIB-5441, never 0). VIB-5553: the runner now prices the pool coins (USDT/WBTC/WETH) into transaction_ledger.price_inputs_json on BOTH lanes (iteration StrategyRunner._backfill_coin_symbol_legs; teardown _ensure_coin_symbols_in_teardown_oracle), so the existing VIB-5429 handler books cost_basis_usd (OPEN $294.57 HIGH, CLOSE $294.84) + realized_pnl_usd ($0.28) on the crypto-numeraire close. G3 FAIL->PASS (realized-yield event now booked); Sigma_lp_usd_null CLOSED (the ~$191 LP value that never reached the component fold now does). Per-coin FEE USD is still unavailable by design (parser stamped BUNDLED / None fee legs) -> the close is ESTIMATED with an explicit curve_fee_usd_unavailable reason (CURVE3 PASS, schema-valid). G6 remains an HONEST FAIL on TWO independent residual surfaces (NOT the Seam-A equity-universe gap VIB-5618 closed): Sigma_lp_fees_null (BUNDLED fees, shared with the stablecoin lp_curve fixture) and Sigma_inventory_reval_usd_null. VIB-5618 re-capture RECLASSIFIED the second: WBTC is now IN the snapshot marks (inventory_reval_per_token measures WBTC + native ETH Delta-mark), so the null is NO LONGER held-WBTC. It is WETH -- a coin RETURNED by the proportional 3-coin close that was never held at the INITIAL endpoint, so it has no initial mark and the all-or-nothing ambient term degrades to unmeasured_price (Empty != Zero). A distinct close-returned-coin endpoint-mark surface (follow-up), not the held-WBTC-unmarked gap. L5_22 XFAIL (registry mode off, informational). NOT masked.
